what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record that registers an image asset linked to a channel memory item in the design-assets channel.
observations: The file contains only metadata, with no prose body.
Fields include id att-f342a609, channel design-assets, attachment_type images, target image://design-assets/Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 6, and an ISO 8601 added timestamp.
The target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing into the design-assets namespace.
standouts: target is an image:// URI rather than a filesystem path.
Record is purely a linkage/timestamp stub with no descriptive content.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a leading and trailing --- delimiter.
Identifier follows an att- prefix pattern.
Timestamp is ISO 8601 with explicit UTC offset (+00:00).
References an asset via a custom image:// scheme.
concerns: No caption, title, or content description for the image.
No author or source message context is recorded.
The image:// target cannot be verified from this file alone.
notes: A minimal metadata stub that records one image attachment in the design-assets channel with a timestamp and URI target.
questions: What is the actual pixel content or semantic subject of the image?
Which message or memory entry does this attachment belong to?
Who added this attachment and why?
Is the image:// target resolvable and current?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as an attachment ledger entry, which matches its apparent purpose of recording an image asset reference.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, queryable record that a specific image asset is attached to a design-assets channel memory.
novelty: The use of a custom image:// URI scheme and a dedicated attachment_type field separate from the channel field.
contribution: It contributes a concrete, timestamped mapping between an attachment identifier and an image asset target, preserving evidence of an asset linkage in the design-assets channel.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record with id att-f342a609 in the design-assets channel linking attachment_type images to image://design-assets/Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 6, added on 2026-06-22T12:25:32Z.
intention_for_embedding: To register and timestamp an image asset attachment for retrieval and provenance within the design-assets channel memory.
